query_normalized: predicting the diffusion of carbon in bcc metals from compositional data materials science
rationale: The paper is a general survey on active learning for data streams in machine learning and does not address the specific materials science domain (carbon diffusion in BCC metals) or the specific mechanism of predicting diffusion from compositional data. It fails to meet any inclusion criteria (a-f) as it lacks the necessary domain connection, specific variables, or canonical methodology for this physical phenomenon, falling instead under the "Off-domain entirely" rejection rule.
